name: Stardew Valley
description: Stardew Valley is an open-ended country-life RPG.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Goal
options.description: Goal for this playthrough Community Center: Complete the Community Center Grandpa's Evaluation: 4 lit candles in Grandpa's evaluation Bottom of the Mines: Reach level 120 in the mines Cryptic Note: Complete the quest "Cryptic Note" (Skull Cavern Floor 100) Master Angler: Catch every fish.

options.label: Farm Type
options.description: What farm to play on?

options.label: Bundle Randomization
options.description: What items are needed for the community center bundles?

options.label: Bundle Price
options.description: How many items are needed for the community center bundles?

options.label: Bundle Per Room
options.description: How many bundles are in each room of the community center?

options.label: Entrance Randomization
options.description: Should area entrances be randomized?

options.label: Start Without
options.description: Items that, in vanilla, you generally start with (or get very quickly), but in Archipelago, you would rather start without them.

options.label: Season Randomization
options.description: Should seasons be randomized?

options.label: Cropsanity
options.description: Pierre now sells a random amount of seasonal seeds and Joja sells them without season requirements, but only in huge packs.

options.label: Backpack Progression
options.description: Shuffle the backpack?

options.label: Backpack Size
options.description: Customize the granularity of the backpack upgrades This works with vanilla and progressive backpack.

options.label: Tool Progression
options.description: Shuffle the tool upgrades?

options.label: Skill Progression
options.description: Shuffle skill levels?

options.label: Building Progression
options.description: Shuffle Carpenter Buildings?

options.label: Festival Locations
options.description: Shuffle Festival Activities?

options.label: Elevator Progression
options.description: Shuffle the elevator?

options.label: Arcade Machine Locations
options.description: Shuffle the arcade machines?

options.label: Special Order Locations
options.description: Shuffle Special Orders?

options.label: Quest Locations
options.description: Include location checks for quests None: No quests are checks Story: Only story quests are checks Number: Story quests and help wanted quests are checks up to the specified amount.

options.label: Fishsanity
options.description: Locations for catching each fish the first time?

options.label: Museumsanity
options.description: Locations for museum donations?

options.label: Monstersanity
options.description: Locations for slaying monsters?

options.label: Shipsanity
options.description: Locations for shipping items?

options.label: Cooksanity
options.description: Locations for cooking food?

options.label: Chefsanity
options.description: Locations for learning cooking recipes?

options.label: Craftsanity
options.description: Checks for crafting items?

options.label: Friendsanity
options.description: Shuffle Friendships?

options.label: Friendsanity Heart Size
options.description: If using friendsanity, how many hearts are received per heart item, and how many hearts must be earned to send a check A higher value will lead to fewer heart items in the item pool, reducing bloat

options.label: Eatsanity
options.description: Locations for eating various items?

options.label: Booksanity
options.description: Shuffle Books?

options.label: Walnutsanity
options.description: Shuffle Walnuts?

options.label: Moviesanity
options.description: Add checks for watching movies?

choices.label: All Movies And All Loved Snacks

options.label: Secretsanity
options.description: Add checks for the various secrets and easter eggs present in Stardew Valley.

options.label: Hatsanity
options.description: Add checks for wearing hats?

options.label: Include Endgame Locations
options.description: Whether to include, as locations, several very expensive things that are usually purchased during the end-game in vanilla.

options.label: Exclude Ginger Island
options.description: Exclude Ginger Island?

options.label: Quick Start
options.description: Do you want the quick start package?

options.label: Starting Money
options.description: Amount of gold when arriving at the farm.

options.label: Profit Margin
options.description: Multiplier over all gold earned in-game by the player.

options.label: Experience Multiplier
options.description: How fast you want to earn skill experience.

options.label: Friendship Multiplier
options.description: How fast you want to earn friendship points with villagers.

options.label: Debris Multiplier
options.description: How much debris will spawn on the player's farm?

options.label: Movement Buff Number
options.description: Number of movement speed buffs to the player that exist as items in the pool.

options.label: Enabled Filler Buffs
options.description: Enable various permanent player buffs to roll as filler items Luck: Increased daily luck Damage: Increased Damage % Defense: Increased Defense Immunity: Increased Immunity Health: Increased Max Health Energy: Increased Max Energy Bite Rate: Shorter delay to get a bite when fishing Fish Trap: Effect similar to the Trap Bobber, but weaker Fishing Bar Size: Increased Fishing Bar Size

options.label: Trap Difficulty
options.description: When rolling filler items, including resource packs, the game can also roll trap items.

options.label: Custom Logic
options.description: Enable various customizations to the logic of the generator.

options.label: Multiple Day Sleep Enabled
options.description: Enable the ability to sleep automatically for multiple days straight?

options.label: Multiple Day Sleep Cost
options.description: How much gold it will cost to use MultiSleep.

options.label: Gifting
options.description: Do you want to enable gifting items to and from other Archipelago slots?

options.label: Mods
options.description: List of mods that will be included in the shuffling.

choices.value: Boarding House and Bus Stop Extension
choices.label: Boarding House And Bus Stop Extension

options.label: Bundle Whitelist
options.description: If using Remixed or Meme bundles, this guarantees some of them will show up in your community center.

choices.value: What The Rock Is Cooking Bundle
choices.label: What The Rock Is Cooking Bundle

options.label: Bundle Blacklist
options.description: If using Remixed or Meme bundles, this guarantees some of them will not show up in your community center.

choices.value: What The Rock Is Cooking Bundle
choices.label: What The Rock Is Cooking Bundle

options.label: Allowed Filler Items
options.description: Types of filler items that can be generated for this slot.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Jojapocalypse
options.description: Joja Co opens a new Archipelago branch, selling you any and all location checks you might want or need, in exchange for money.

options.label: Joja Start Price
options.description: The price of Jojapocalypse items at the very beginning of the game.

options.label: Joja End Price
options.description: The price of the very last Jojapocalypse item you will buy.

options.label: Joja Pricing Pattern
options.description: Chooses the pricing strategy of Jojapocalypse sold location checks.

options.label: Joja Purchases For Membership
options.description: After buying this number of location checks for Joja, you will earn your very own Joja Membership!

options.label: Joja Are You Sure
options.description: Jojapocalypse will be an extremely unfulfilling experience.
